description: VMC convention, axis grouping, setup ordering, spindle vs feature axis, WCS assignment, corner-zero heuristic, and stock carryover — mirrors 5. setup_planning.py. Workholding device choice is summarized here but detailed face templates are in 06_workholding.json.

vmc_convention.comment: Default spindle points -Y (tool from +Y toward part). Feature axis is direction hole opens; spindle_direction = opposite of feature_axis per group.

principal_axis_definition: Unit vector aligns with ±X, ±Y, or ±Z within tolerance
same_setup_rule: Clusters whose feature_axis are parallel and same direction (not anti-parallel) share one setup; anti-parallel = separate setups
grouping_algorithm: Collect machinable clusters: not background, machine_type not none, has feature_axis
Planar and no-axis clusters assigned separately to best existing setup
Group by exact same-direction feature_axis using _are_same_direction
Principal groups: setup_type principal; non-principal: setup_type angled + rotation_from_default

setup_order_within_group.machining_sequence: Sort clusters by ascending process_sequence length then cluster_id

wcs.assignment: setup_id 1 → G54, etc., capped at G59

wcs_origin_corner_heuristic.rule: Treat bounding box min as 'at CAD origin' if |min| < fraction × (max − min) for that axis pair used in the setup plane
wcs_origin_corner_heuristic.reference: AD-006 — corner zero keeps G-code positive when part at CAD origin

stock_state.machined_face_accumulation: Union of workholding.clearance_faces from all prior setups

coord_system_optional.rule: If CoordSystem passed to plan_setups, machine-space annotations added; else CAD axes used as-is

warnings: Full WCS coordinate formulas per spindle direction remain in _compute_wcs_origin(); this sheet captures thresholds and intent only.
LIVE (applied at import): vmc_convention.default_spindle_direction_cad, axis_parallel_tolerance, wcs.sequence, wcs_origin_corner_heuristic.fraction_of_dimension, stock_state.all_part_faces.
DOCUMENTATION ONLY (not yet globals): grouping_algorithm, axis_group_sort, setup_order_within_group, machinable_filters — these are fixed logic in plan_setups().
